final:
module PIPO_Shift_Register (
    input wire clk,
    input wire reset,
    input wire load,
    input wire shift,
    input wire [5-1:1-1] data_in,
    output reg [4:0] data_out
);

always @(posedge clk or posedge reset) begin
    if (reset) begin
        data_out <= 5'b00000;
    end else if (load) begin
        data_out <= data_in;
    end else if (shift) begin
        data_out <= {1'b0, data_out[4:1]};
    end
end

endmodule
